children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There are authorized to be such sums as are necessary to carry out this subchapter.1So in original. Probably should be followed by “appropriated”.1

children.heading: Loans
children.label: b Loans
children.text: The Secretary shall not use more than $15,000,000 of any funds made available for a fiscal year to make loans under this subchapter.

children.heading: Availability
children.label: c Availability
children.text: Funds appropriated to carry out this subchapter shall remain available until expended.
